title: Junior Project Manager Office (PMO) (all genders)
bonus_skills: Tool proficiency (JIRA, Confluence, Asana or similar)
matched_skills: Translating strategy/briefs into project plans — HSBC translating C-suite priorities into structured programmes
End-to-end delivery & milestone tracking (HSBC, Hapag-Lloyd agile sprints)
Written communication & reporting — HSBC newsletters, dashboards, sprint reviews
Marketing context: MSc PR/Advertising + IPC B2B marketing campaigns
missing_skills: Aviation / Lufthansa / digital marketing agency context — domain gap (soft, not hard)
German language (B1+ — not explicitly stated as requirement but Frankfurt-based agency)
core_responsibilities: Translate marketing strategies, creative briefs, and client needs into structured project plans
Own end-to-end delivery of marketing/digital projects
Ensure PMO governance, efficient execution, and transparent cross-team communication
Support stakeholder alignment and reporting across Lufthansa digital marketing initiatives
recommended_emphasis: HSBC: translate complex programme updates into C-suite narratives — directly maps to 'translate strategies/briefs into project plans'
HSBC: 6-workstream PMO governance + milestone tracking — core PMO credential
Hapag-Lloyd: agile sprint ceremonies, JIRA/Confluence — maps to structured project execution
Marketing background (MSc PR/Advertising, IPC B2B campaigns) — differentiator for marketing-focused PMO
AI tools (ChatGPT/Claude) — positions as digital-native, aligned with Oscar Bravo's tech culture

company_info.size_raw: Oscar Bravo — Lufthansa Group in-house digital marketing agency
